'''ân-v-p-d''' ('''kanavpedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elt|elt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elt|elt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-v-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanavpedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavpedoko|thinavpedoko]] || [[word:jinavpedoko|jinavpedoko]] || [[word:shinavpedoko|shinavpedoko]] || [[word:kinavpedoko|kinavpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunavpedoko|thuthunavpedoko]] || [[word:jujunavpedoko|jujunavpedoko]] || [[word:shushunavpedoko|shushunavpedoko]] || [[word:kukunavpedoko|kukunavpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunavpedoko|thunavpedoko]] || [[word:junavpedoko|junavpedoko]] || [[word:shunavpedoko|shunavpedoko]] || [[word:kunavpedoko|kunavpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunavpedoko|thunavpedoko]] || [[word:junavpedoko|junavpedoko]] || [[word:shunavpedoko|shunavpedoko]] || [[word:kunavpedoko|kunavpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenavpedoko|thenavpedoko]] || [[word:jenavpedoko|jenavpedoko]] || [[word:shenavpedoko|shenavpedoko]] || [[word:kenavpedoko|kenavpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonavpedoko|thothonavpedoko]] || [[word:jojonavpedoko|jojonavpedoko]] || [[word:shoshonavpedoko|shoshonavpedoko]] || [[word:kokonavpedoko|kokonavpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonavpedoko|thonavpedoko]] || [[word:jonavpedoko|jonavpedoko]] || [[word:shonavpedoko|shonavpedoko]] || [[word:konavpedoko|konavpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonavpedoko|thonavpedoko]] || [[word:jonavpedoko|jonavpedoko]] || [[word:shonavpedoko|shonavpedoko]] || [[word:konavpedoko|konavpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnavpedoko|thĂŠnavpedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnavpedoko|jĂŠnavpedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnavpedoko|shĂŠnavpedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnavpedoko|kĂŠnavpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanavpedoko|thathanavpedoko]] || [[word:jajanavpedoko|jajanavpedoko]] || [[word:shashanavpedoko|shashanavpedoko]] || [[word:kakanavpedoko|kakanavpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanavpedoko|thanavpedoko]] || [[word:janavpedoko|janavpedoko]] || [[word:shanavpedoko|shanavpedoko]] || [[word:kanavpedoko|kanavpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanavpedoko|thanavpedoko]] || [[word:janavpedoko|janavpedoko]] || [[word:shanavpedoko|shanavpedoko]] || [[word:kanavpedoko|kanavpedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
